name: RhytmGuide
description: Turns Geometry Dash into a rhythm game. Loads a .gdr / .gdr.json macro and draws minimalist guide lines on the level where inputs should happen, with live timing feedback in milliseconds.

enabled.name: Enable Guide
enabled.description: Master toggle for the whole rhythm guide overlay.

show-player2.name: Show Player 2 Inputs
show-player2.description: Also render guide lines for the second player in dual sections.

hide-on-ship.name: Hide During Ship
hide-on-ship.description: Instantly hides all lines, markers and texts while the player is a ship, right after the last input before the ship portal.

hide-on-wave.name: Hide During Wave
hide-on-wave.description: Instantly hides all lines, markers and texts while the player is a wave, right after the last input before the wave portal.

macro-file.name: Macro File
macro-file.description: Pick a .gdr or .gdr.json macro (xBot / xdBot format). Reloads automatically when changed or when entering a level.

custom-fps.name: FPS Override
custom-fps.description: Overrides the macro framerate used to convert frames to time. 0 = use the framerate stored in the macro.

input-offset-ms.name: Input Offset (ms)
input-offset-ms.description: Global calibration. Shifts every expected input time by this many milliseconds (positive = later).

approach-ms.name: Approach Window (ms)
approach-ms.description: How early a guide line appears before its input.

marker-size.name: Marker Size
marker-size.description: Radius of the white marker that attaches to the player while an input is active.

tap-marker-ms.name: Tap Marker Duration (ms)
tap-marker-ms.description: How long the white marker stays on the player for tap inputs (holds keep it until release).

show-timing-text.name: Show Timing Text
show-timing-text.description: Shows 'In' for a perfect hit or the deviation in milliseconds (+ = late, - = early).

perfect-ms.name: "In" Window (ms)
perfect-ms.description: Maximum absolute deviation that still counts as a perfect 'In' hit.

match-window-ms.name: Match Window (ms)
match-window-ms.description: A real key press is matched to the closest expected input within this window.

text-fade-ms.name: Text Fade Time (ms)
text-fade-ms.description: How long the timing text floats and fades out.
